tasks.label: Test Server
tasks.detail: Uses the built-in PHP server. Opens the address of the starting server in the browser.

tasks.label: Shared Host ZIP
tasks.detail: Make a ZIP for extraction over FTP on a Shared host server

tasks.label: Debain Setup for Apache Web Server
tasks.detail: Creates an debian package which can be extracted with apt.

tasks.label: Starter kit of Chitch
tasks.detail: Creates an archive that can be used to set up an independent development of Chitch locally. Also creates a SHA256 from the archive.

tasks.label: Delta Diff from pristine
tasks.detail: Creates an patch/diff file from the initial pristine source code snapshot.

tasks.label: Commit Diff
tasks.detail: Creates an patch/diff file from the initial pristine source code snapshot.

tasks.label: New pristine (full) snapshot patch
tasks.detail: Creates snapshot of the source code by comparing to the empty commit, in a patch format.

tasks.label: File dependencies image
tasks.detail: An image of all the dependencies between build files defined in the makefile. Requires `make2graph` and `graphviz` to be installed

tasks.label: Squash Image of source
tasks.detail: Makes an read-ony mountable image of the source code.

tasks.label: PHP Syntax Check
tasks.detail: Check the syntax for all php files in source/
